steps.name: gcr.io/perl-cloud-ci/google-cloud-perl-ci-540:latest
args:
set -e
echo "=== Testing on Debian Perl 5.40 Pre-baked Container ==="
mkdir -p /tmp/build1 && cp -a . /tmp/build1 && cd /tmp/build1
(cd Protobuf && rm -f Makefile && perl Makefile.PL && make -j$(nproc) && cp -f libprotobufperl.so blib/arch/auto/Protobuf/ && export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$(pwd)/blib/arch/auto/Protobuf:$(pwd):$LD_LIBRARY_PATH && prove -b -It/lib t/ && make install)
(cd google-auth && perl Makefile.PL && make -j$(nproc) && AUTHOR_TESTING=0 RELEASE_TESTING=0 prove -b -It/lib t/ && make install)
(cd Google-Api-Common && perl Makefile.PL && make -j$(nproc) && AUTHOR_TESTING=0 RELEASE_TESTING=0 prove -b -It/lib t/ && make install)
(cd Google-gRPC && perl Makefile.PL && make -j$(nproc) && AUTHOR_TESTING=0 RELEASE_TESTING=0 prove -b -It/lib t/ && make install)
(cd Module-Starter-Protobuf && perl Makefile.PL && make -j$(nproc) && AUTHOR_TESTING=0 RELEASE_TESTING=0 prove -b -It/lib t/ && make install)
for d in Google-Cloud-*; do
  if [ -d "$d" ]; then
    (cd "$d" && perl Makefile.PL && make -j$(nproc) && AUTHOR_TESTING=0 RELEASE_TESTING=0 prove -b -It/lib t/ && make install)
  fi
done
perl integration_tests/01_bigquery_stack.pl
perl integration_tests/02_bigquery_multofd_lb.pl
